error.signature: The serialized field layout has changed. Serialization layout for type 'PlayerData' has been changed.

verdict.summary: Serialized class layout changed between builds. Saved data (ScriptableObjects, prefabs, scenes) contain stale field definitions.

dead_ends.action: Delete all serialized data files and start fresh
dead_ends.why_fails: Destroys save data and scene references. Use FormerlySerializedAs to migrate instead.

dead_ends.action: Revert the class changes to match old serialization
dead_ends.why_fails: Blocks progress. The correct approach is to migrate the data forward, not lock the code.

workarounds.action: Use FormerlySerializedAs attribute when renaming fields
workarounds.how: [FormerlySerializedAs("oldFieldName")] public int newFieldName;  // preserves serialized data
OnAfterDeserialize() to convert old data layout to new format on load

workarounds.action: Re-serialize affected assets after changing fields
workarounds.how: Select affected prefabs/ScriptableObjects > right-click > Reimport; or use ForceReserializeAssets API
